tasks.title: truncate() splits words and mishandles the ellipsis

runs.task_title: truncate() splits words and mishandles the ellipsis
runs.bug_report:
Our card component truncates preview text with truncate(text, limit) in
solution.js. Editors report two problems: it cuts words in half, and short
strings that fit within the limit still get an ellipsis appended.

For example truncate("the quick brown fox", 10) returns "the quick …"
with a dangling space, and truncate("hi", 10) returns "hi…" when it should
just return "hi".

Fix truncate() so it never cuts a word in half, only adds an ellipsis when
the text was actually shortened, and never leaves a trailing space before
the ellipsis. If a single word is longer than the limit it may be cut.

cases.name: no trailing space before the ellipsis

cases.name: never returns more than the limit, plus at most the ellipsis
text within the limit is returned verbatim, no ellipsis
an ellipsis appears only when the text was shortened
never leaves a trailing space before the ellipsis
does not cut a word in half unless the word alone exceeds the limit
a single over-long word may be cut
